title: Seseli irramosum
taxonomy: Seseli irramosum is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It belongs to the genus Seseli, which consists of several species of plants native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The family Apiaceae, also known as the parsley or carrot family, is a large and diverse group of plants that includes many common herbs and vegetables. Seseli irramosum is a perennial or biennial plant that produces small white or yellow flowers in clusters. The species is often found growing in dry, rocky areas and is valued for its fragrant foliage and medicinal properties.
uses: Seseli irramosum is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. The roots of Seseli irramosum are valued for their potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, Seseli irramosum has been used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions. However, the efficacy and safety of Seseli irramosum as a medicinal herb have not been extensively scientifically studied. More research is needed to fully understand the potential health benefits of Seseli irramosum.

constituents: Seseli irramosum contains seselin, a characteristic compound found in this plant species. Seselin is a type of sesquiterpene lactone, a class of compounds known for their biological activity. intro: Seseli iriomotense (also known as Seseli iriomotense) is a perennial plant native to Japan, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues and infections. The bioactive constituents of Seseli iriomotense include sesquiterpenes, sesquiterpene lactones, and other polyphenolic compounds. Seseli iriomotense is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
